name: chefbase-recipe-import-backend
description: Standalone backend for universal recipe import with Playwright and AI-assisted extraction.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/routes/importRecipeRoute.js && node --check src/services/browserExtractor.js && node --check src/services/httpPageExtractor.js && node --check src/services/recipeExtractor.js && node --check src/services/openAiRecipeExtractor.js && node --check src/services/deterministicRecipeExtractor.js && node --check src/utils/normalizeRecipe.js
